# UC-15.5.13 · CCTV ANPR License Plate Recognition Event Audit Trail

## Description

Plate reads gate logistics yards and campuses; auditable logs support investigations and privacy reviews.

## Value

Balances security with data minimization via retention policies.

## Implementation

(1) Redact in dashboard; full plate restricted role. (2) Hash for analytics where possible.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="cctv:analytics" earliest=-7d
| where match(lower(analytic_type), "(?i)anpr|lpr|plate")
| eval plate=coalesce(license_plate, plate_text, "")
| stats count by plate camera_id action
```

## Visualization

Table top plates; histogram reads per gate.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
